name: muslim
title: Sahih Muslim
author: Imam Muslim ibn al-Hajjaj
description: Second most authentic collection of Hadith.

books.name: Introduction
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Faith
books.description: Fundamental teachings on faith (Iman), its branches, and matters of belief in Allah, His Angels, Books, Messengers, and the Last Day.

books.name: The Book of Purification
books.description: Comprehensive rulings on Taharah, including all forms of ritual purity required for acts of worship.

books.name: The Book of Menstruation
books.description: Islamic jurisprudence regarding menstruation (Hayd) and postnatal bleeding, detailing their effect on worship.

books.name: The Book of Prayers
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Mosques and Places of Prayer
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Travellers
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Friday
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Two Eids
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Rain
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Eclipses
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Prayer - Funerals
books.description: Detailed instructions on the times, methods, and spiritual dimensions of the five daily prayers (Salat).

books.name: The Book of Zakat
books.description: Comprehensive guide to the obligatory almsgiving (Zakat), detailing who must pay, allowable recipients, and calculable wealth types.

books.name: The Book of Fasting
books.description: Regulations regarding obligatory fasting during Ramadan and voluntary fasts throughout the year.

books.name: The Book of I'tikaf
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Pilgrimage
books.description: Complete rites and spiritual significance of the major pilgrimage to Mecca (Hajj).

books.name: The Book of Marriage
books.description: Extensive teachings on the marital contract, domestic harmony, choosing a spouse, and spousal rights.

books.name: The Book of Suckling
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Divorce
books.description: The procedures, cooling-off periods (Iddah), and regulations surrounding marital dissolution (Talaq).

books.name: The Book of Invoking Curses
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Emancipating Slaves
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Transactions
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Musaqah
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of the Rules of Inheritance
books.description: The complex and precise distribution of inherited wealth among surviving relatives as ordained in Islam.

books.name: The Book of Gifts
books.description: The etiquette and legal parameters of giving gifts, transferring wealth, and fostering goodwill.

books.name: The Book of Wills
books.description: Instructions on bequeathing property through a final testament (Wasiyyah) within permitted Islamic limits.

books.name: The Book of Vows
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book of Oaths
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book of Oaths, Muharibin, Qasas (Retaliation), and Diyat (Blood Money)
books.description: Rulings on swearing oaths, fulfilling vows, and the expiation required when breaking them.

books.name: The Book of Legal Punishments
books.description: The prescribed penalties (Hudud) for major transgressions to preserve societal justice and security.

books.name: The Book of Judicial Decisions
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Lost Property
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Jihad and Expeditions
books.description: The principles of struggle, rules of military engagement, treaties, and the high status of martyrs.

books.name: The Book on Government
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Hunting, Slaughter, and what may be Eaten
books.description: Rules regarding lawful hunting practices, use of hunting animals, and slaughtering conditions.

books.name: The Book of Sacrifices
books.description: The Sunnah of ritual animal sacrifice during Eid al-Adha (Udhiyah) and child birth (Aqiqah).

books.name: The Book of Drinks
books.description: Permitted beverages, prohibitions on intoxicants, and the Prophetic manners for drinking.

books.name: The Book of Clothes and Adornment
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Manners and Etiquette
books.description: The essence of excellent character (Adab), emphasizing respect, kindness, and societal morals.

books.name: The Book of Greetings
books.description: The etiquette of spreading peace (Salam), shaking hands, seeking permission to enter, and gathering norms.

books.name: The Book Concerning the Use of Correct Words
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Poetry
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Dreams
books.description: The significance of dreams, visions, and their interpretations in Islamic tradition.

books.name: The Book of Virtues
books.description: Accounts of the exceptional qualities and achievements of various Muslims and tribes.

books.name: The Book of the Merits of the Companions
books.description: The brilliant merits, virtues, and ranking of the Prophet's companions (Sahabah).

books.name: The Book of Virtue, Enjoining Good Manners, and Joining of the Ties of Kinship
books.description: Accounts of the exceptional qualities and achievements of various Muslims and tribes.

books.name: The Book of Destiny
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Knowledge
books.description: The virtues of seeking Islamic knowledge, the etiquette of a student, and the responsibility of scholars to convey the truth.

books.name: The Book Pertaining to the Remembrance of Allah, Supplication, Repentance and Seeking Forgiveness
books.description: The texts and virtues of calling upon Allah (Du'a) in various situations.

books.name: The Book of Heart-Melting Traditions
books.description: Teachings aimed at spiritually softening the heart (Riqaq), practicing asceticism, and warning against worldly attachments.

books.name: The Book of Repentance
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Characteristics of The Hypocrites And Rulings Concerning Them
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: Characteristics of the Day of Judgment, Paradise, and Hell
books.description: Descriptions of the Day of Resurrection, its terrors, the Reckoning, and the ultimate scales of justice.

books.name: The Book of Paradise, its Description, its Bounties and its Inhabitants
books.description: Vivid depictions of Jannah, its bounties, and the characteristics of its eternal inhabitants.

books.name: The Book of Tribulations and Portents of the Last Hour
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.

books.name: The Book of Zuhd and Softening of Hearts
books.description: Teachings aimed at spiritually softening the heart (Riqaq), practicing asceticism, and warning against worldly attachments.

books.name: The Book of Commentary on the Qur'an
books.description: A section containing authenticated traditions on this unique subject, compiled by the author.
